description:
## Deep Component Audit ŌĆö hx-spinner

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/`

### wc-mcp Tools ŌĆö USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** ŌĆö `--hx-` tokens. Track color, indicator color, size. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** ŌĆö WCAG 2.1 AA. role="status". aria-label="Loading". Reduced-motion.
3. **Functionality** ŌĆö Size variants. Color variants. Track visible/hidden. Speed customization.
4. **TypeScript** ŌĆö Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** ŌĆö Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. SVG/CSS animation. Performance (GPU layer).
6. **CEM Accuracy** ŌĆö All API documented.
7. **Tests** ŌĆö 80%+ coverage. Rendering. Sizes. ARIA. Reduced-motion.
8. **Storybook** ŌĆö Sizes. Colors. In button. Overlay.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** ŌĆö AJAX throbber replacement. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** ŌĆö CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-spinner

summary:
## Summary: Deep Audit v2: hx-spinner

### Changes Implemented
- **P0-1 (CRITICAL):** Removed dual screen reader announcement ŌĆö eliminated `.spinner__sr-text` span, keeping only `role="status"` + `aria-label` as the sole announcement mechanism
- **P0-2 (CRITICAL):** Added `decorative` boolean property ŌĆö when set, uses `role="presentation"` and removes `aria-label`, making spinner a11y-silent for use alongside text that conveys loading state
- **P1-1 (HIGH):** Documented `--hx-duration-spinner` CSS custom property in JSDoc block
- **P1-2 (HIGH):** Replaced ambiguous static reduced-motion fallback with `hx-spinner-pulse` opacity animation (2s ease-in-out)
- **P1-3 (HIGH):** Added `rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3)` fallback for inverted track color + `@supports` guard for `color-mix()`
- **P1-4/P1-5 (HIGH):** Added 8 new tests: decorative mode (7 tests), label reflection, reactive label update
- Added `@internal` to `_isTokenSize` private method to exclude from CEM
- Fixed `@csspart base` description from "SVG element" to "wrapper element"
- Added `reflect: true` to `label` property for Drupal Twig compatibility
- Added `Decorative` story and `decorative` control to Storybook

### Files Modified
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/hx-spinner.ts` ŌĆö decorative prop, remove sr-text, JSDoc fixes
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/hx-spinner.styles.ts` ŌĆö reduced motion pulse, color-mix fallback, remove sr-text styles
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/hx-spinner.test.ts` ŌĆö 8 new tests (30 total, up from 22)
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/hx-spinner.stories.ts` ŌĆö Decorative story + argType
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/AUDIT.md` ŌĆö Full Deep Audit v2 report

### Verification Status
- `npm run verify`: 0 errors (lint + format:check + type-check)
- `npm run test:library`: 3120 tests pass (79 files), all 30 hx-spinner tests pass
- `git diff --stat`: Only intended files changed
- wc-mcp health score: 100 (A)

### Risks/Blockers Encountered
- None. All fixes applied cleanly.

### Learnings
- The wc-mcp a11y score (35/100) is a false negative for status indicators ŌĆö form association, keyboard events, focus, and disabled dimensions don't apply to spinners
- `color-mix()` needs `@supports` guards for enterprise healthcare environments with older browsers
- Dual announcement (aria-label + live region text) is a common pattern that causes redundant screen reader output

### Notes for Developer
- P2 items documented in AUDIT.md but not fixed (intentional design choices or systemic gaps)
- The `decorative` prop follows the same pattern as `aria-hidden` but works correctly through Shadow DOM
